sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِنْتٌ اسْمُهَا آيَةُ تَعِيشُ فِي قَرْيَةٍ جَمِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bila je djevojčica po imenu Aja koja je živjela u lijepom selu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a girl named Aya who lived in a beautiful village.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ أَنْ تُرِيَ الْقَرْيَةَ لِصَدِيقَتِهَا الَّتِي جَاءَتْ مِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Htjela je pokazati selo svojoj prijateljici koja je došla iz grada.
sentences.translationEn: She wanted to show the village to her friend who came from the city.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيَا مَعًا فِي الْحُقُولِ وَبِجَانِبِ النَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Zajedno su šetale po poljima i pored rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: They walked together through the fields and beside the river.

sentences.translation: Prijateljica je rekla: «Tvoje selo je ljepše od slika».
sentences.translationEn: The friend said: «Your village is more beautiful than pictures».
